name: Do I really need a lawyer for my twisted ankle from construction in Salt Lake?

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for my twisted ankle from construction in Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes for serious injuries or third-parties; comp simple ones DIY but risky.** Utah lawyers boost recoveries 3x via investigations.[5] Key factors: (1) Identify hidden liable parties; (2) fight denials/fault; (3) negotiate max value; (4) no upfront fees.[4] Free consults weigh costs—most worth it for complications. Handle simple alone, complex with pro.
